label: Sum maker
description: Runs each option in the list in sequence (or in random order when resolveInOrder is false) and combines their outputs into a single thing set.

options.label: Options
options.description: List of maker entries whose outputs are summed together.

resolveInOrder.label: Resolve in order
resolveInOrder.description: When true, entries are executed in list order. When false, execution order is randomized.
